name: Jethro Monroe / Clinical 16-bit v5.0
description: STRATEGIC PIVOT: Chroma-Sensitive Separation (2:1 C:L ratio). Previous strategy (colorblind with 100:1 L:C) replaced with chroma-prioritization. lWeight=5.0, cWeight=10.0 makes engine HIGHLY sensitive to chroma differences - blue rectangles (C≈49) clearly distinguished from fur (C<15). Explicit forced_centroids anchor (L=40, a=5, b=-45) ensures deterministic blue slot reservation. Moderate neutralCentroidClampThreshold=15.0 (relaxed from 20.0) with higher vibrancyThreshold=85 (noise gate). Tighter hueLockAngle=2 prevents hue drift. Goal: Let chroma do the heavy lifting to separate blue from gray.
